    </ul>
    <h3 {...{
      "id": "-eu-compliance--dsa-requirements"

    <h2 {...{
      "id": "answers"
    }}>{`Answers`}</h2>
    {/* Let's keep the answers in the same order as the questions! */}
    {/* ### 🛠️ Development Environment & Tooling */}
    <h4 {...{
      "id": "how-can-i-enable-developer-mode"
    }}>{`How can I enable Developer Mode?`}</h4>
    <p>{`You need to enable Developer mode in both the UXP Developer Tool and the host application. Follow the instructions in the `}<a parentName="p" {...{
        "href": "../../introduction/essentials/dev-tools/index.md#first-launch"
      }}>{`UXP Developer Tool`}</a>{` and `}<a parentName="p" {...{
        "href": "../../plugins/index.md#prerequisites"
      }}>{`Premiere`}</a>{` guides.`}</p>
    <h4 {...{
      "id": "in-udt-i-get-the-error-plugin-load-failed-host-application-specified-is-not-available-make-sure-the-host-application-is-started"
    }}>{`In UDT, I get the error "Plugin Load Failed, Host Application specified is not available. Make sure the host application is started."`}</h4>
    <p>{`Ensure that Premiere is running. If it is, check that the host application's Developer Mode is enabled; follow the instructions in the `}<a parentName="p" {...{
        "href": "../../plugins/index.md#prerequisites"
      }}>{`this guide`}</a>{`.`}</p>
    {/* 🎨 User Interfaces */}
    <h4 {...{
      "id": "how-can-i-use-spectrum-web-components-in-my-plugin"
    }}>{`How can I use Spectrum Web Components in my plugin?`}</h4>
    <p>{`You can use Spectrum Web Components in your plugin by following the instructions in the `}<a parentName="p" {...{
        "href": "../../uxp-api/reference-spectrum/swc/index.md"
      }}>{`Spectrum Web Components`}</a>{` guide.`}</p>
    <h4 {...{
      "id": "can-i-use-react-spectrum-instead-of-spectrum-web-components"
    }}>{`Can I use React Spectrum instead of Spectrum Web Components?`}</h4>
    <p>{`Given that UXP does not support the entire set of HTML Elements and CSS properties, `}<a parentName="p" {...{
        "href": "https://react-spectrum.adobe.com/react-spectrum/index.html"
      }}>{`React Spectrum`}</a>{` components may not work as expected. For this reason, we recommend using `}<a parentName="p" {...{
        "href": "https://opensource.adobe.com/spectrum-web-components/using-swc-react/"
      }}>{`React Wrappers for Spectrum Web Components`}</a>{` instead. Make sure you have enabled the `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`enableSWCSupport`}</inlineCode>{` feature flag in your `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`manifest.json`}</inlineCode>{` file and installed the right version of the components.`}</p>
    {/* 📦 Installers and Packages */}
    <h4 {...{
      "id": "i-am-unable-to-install-a-plugin"
    }}>{`I am unable to install a plugin.`}</h4>
    <p>{`Please refer to `}<a parentName="p" {...{
        "href": "../../plugins/distribution/install/index.md#troubleshooting"
      }}>{`these troubleshooting steps`}</a>{` for more details.`}</p>
    <h4 {...{
      "id": "my-ccx-package-is-being-rejected-when-submitted-to-the-creative-cloud-marketplace-what-could-be-wrong"
    }}>{`My `}<inlineCode parentName="h4">{`.ccx`}</inlineCode>{` package is being rejected when submitted to the Creative Cloud Marketplace. What could be wrong?`}</h4>
    <p>{`Check if the `}<a parentName="p" {...{
        "href": "../../plugins/concepts/manifest/index.md#host"
      }}><inlineCode parentName="a">{`host`}</inlineCode></a>{` property in your `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`manifest.json`}</inlineCode>{` is an object, not an array. If it's an array, the validation will fail. See `}<a parentName="p" {...{
        "href": "../../plugins/distribution/package/index.md#host-applications"
      }}>{`Host Applications`}</a>{` for details.`}</p>
    <h4 {...{
      "id": "should-i-use-an-array-or-an-object-for-the-host-property-in-the-manifestjson"
    }}>{`Should I use an Array or an Object for the `}<inlineCode parentName="h4">{`host`}</inlineCode>{` property in the `}<inlineCode parentName="h4">{`manifest.json`}</inlineCode>{`?`}</h4>
    <p>{`The `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`host`}</inlineCode>{` property must be a single `}<a parentName="p" {...{
        "href": "../../plugins/concepts/manifest/index.md#hostdefinition"
      }}><inlineCode parentName="a">{`HostDefinition`}</inlineCode></a>{` Object for production. Arrays are only allowed during development for convenience. See the `}<a parentName="p" {...{
        "href": "../../plugins/distribution/package/index.md#host-applications"
      }}>{`Package a UXP plugin`}</a>{` section for details.`}</p>
    {/* 🇪🇺 EU Compliance & DSA Requirements */}
    <h4 {...{
      "id": "why-is-my-plugin-not-visible-in-the-eu-region"
    }}>{`Why is my plugin not visible in the EU region?`}</h4>
    <p>{`This could be due to incomplete or outdated trader information in your publisher profile. Please make sure all required details are updated and accurate.`}</p>
    <h4 {...{
      "id": "how-can-i-update-my-trader-details-in-the-publisher-profile-after-submission"
    }}>{`How can I update my trader details in the publisher profile after submission?`}</h4>
    <p>{`To update only your trader details in the publisher profile after submission, please contact our team at `}<a parentName="p" {...{
        "href": "mailto:ccintrev@adobe.com"
      }}>{`ccintrev@adobe.com`}</a>{`. At this time, we are not processing change requests for other fields in the publisher profile.`}</p>
    <h4 {...{
      "id": "what-happens-if-an-eu-user-has-a-deep-link-to-my-plugin-and-i-am-not-compliant-with-the-european-union-digital-services-act-dsa-trader-requirements"
    }}>{`What happens if an EU user has a deep link to my plugin and I am not compliant with the European Union Digital Services Act (DSA) trader requirements?`}</h4>
    <p>{`If you are not compliant with the European Union Digital Services Act trader requirements, an EU user with a deep link to your plugin will not be able to install it. They will see a banner with a message indicating the compliance issue.`}</p>
    <h4 {...{
      "id": "can-an-eu-user-still-use-my-plugin-if-they-have-already-installed-it-but-i-am-not-compliant-with-the-dsa-trader-requirements"
    }}>{`Can an EU user still use my plugin if they have already installed it, but I am not compliant with the DSA trader requirements?`}</h4>
    <p>{`Yes, if an EU user has already installed your plugin, they will still be able to use it even if you are not compliant with the DSA trader requirements. However, they will see a banner with a message indicating the compliance issue.`}</p>

    </MDXLayout>;
}
